prompt: I want to set up the Auto Browser Chrome extension and configure it to use credentials from a file. Can you walk me through the steps? I already have the control service running.

assertions.name: mentions-extension-setup
assertions.description: The answer explains how to load the extension in Chrome
assertions.expected: Mentions chrome://extensions, developer mode, load unpacked, extension/ directory

assertions.name: mentions-sidepanel
assertions.description: The answer mentions the sidepanel as the operator console

assertions.name: explains-extension-execution-flow
assertions.description: The answer explains how extension execution differs from service execution
assertions.expected: Mentions observe-decide-act cycle, POST /api/tasks/:id/decide, no system mouse, DOM-only actions

assertions.name: explains-credential-file-format
assertions.description: The answer shows the credentials.json format
assertions.expected: Shows the JSON structure with sites, username, password fields

assertions.name: mentions-site-permissions
assertions.description: The answer mentions that the extension requests runtime site permissions
assertions.expected: Mentions granting site access or permissions per origin
